user.title: Connect to Fronius Gen24 Inverter
user.description: Enter the local IP address and credentials for the inverter web interface. Use the 'customer' or 'technician' account.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the inverter. Check the IP address and port.

add_schedule.name: Add TOU schedule
add_schedule.description: Create a new time-of-use rule on the inverter.

config_entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional target integration entry id when multiple inverters are configured.

active.name: Active
active.description: Whether the new schedule should start enabled.

schedule_type.name: Schedule Type
schedule_type.description: One of CHARGE_MAX, CHARGE_MIN, DISCHARGE_MAX, DISCHARGE_MIN.

power.name: Power
power.description: Power in watts for this schedule.

remove_schedule.name: Remove TOU schedule
remove_schedule.description: Delete an existing time-of-use rule from the inverter.

config_entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional target integration entry id when multiple inverters are configured.

rule_id.name: Rule ID
rule_id.description: Stable rule id for deleting a schedule.

index.name: Index
index.description: Optional list index for backward compatibility.
